absolute_import
VisitorTransform)
StatListNodec
ExtractPxdCodea
    Finds nodes in a pxd file that should generate code, and
    returns them in a StatListNode.
    The result is a tuple (StatListNode, ModuleScope), i.e.
    everything that is needed from the pxd after it is processed.
    A purer approach would be to separately compile the pxd code,
    but the result would have to be slightly more sophisticated
    than pure strings (functions + wanted interned strings +
    wanted utility code + wanted cached objects) so for now this
    approach is taken.
    c
stats)
funcs
visitchildrenr
posZ
scope)
self
root
D/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/Cython/Compiler/CodeGeneration.py
__call__
ExtractPxdCode.__call__c
append
noder
visit_FuncDefNode
z ExtractPxdCode.visit_FuncDefNodec
visit_Node!
ExtractPxdCode.visit_NodeN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__r
__future__r

Nodesr
<module>
